title: [Cobblemon] Kazerio's Prismatic Shinies
description: A Cobblemon addon that adds another tier of Shiny Pokemon (Radiant Shinies)
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5867444a725f280be0a899e8ed5c910011dc314b.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a3dd17491bce3785436740ee2f288506aa9b43f_0.webp)

## Features
- **Another tier of shiny Pokemon** with an extremely low chance of finding (**10% chance when the pokemon is shiny**)
- **Custom sound effects**
- **Custom particles** (including particles for when the Pokemon is sent out)
- **Chat notifications** (never miss finding one!)

## Credits
- TheRealSky and his pack [Cobblemon Radiants](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-radiants) for figuring out how to make these work
- The wonderful people that allowed me to use the colour schemes for a few of the pokemon

## IMPORTANT TO NOTE
- This datapack/mod is made for Cobblemon 1.6

- Make sure to add this pack into your Resource Packs folder as well if you downloaded it as a datapack

- The colour schemes were thought up by myself and others from the Cobblemon discord (credits in gallery)
  - If there happens to be a colour scheme similar (but not 100% the same) to one posted in the forums without credit there's a high chance it was purely coincidental

- For server owners, you are free to use this pack as long as the forms aren't made to generate revenue, locked behind a paywall, or being used as a premium (basically no money should be made from them)

- This pack is still under development so things are subject to change
